scope: recompile the qualified O1 occupational census into a geometry-complete, species-free assignment carrier without changing archived O1 or Q1

mathematical_contract.carrier: the primitive species-free parent, its canonical row-HNF supercell, one expanded coordinate per action node, exact translation-coset labels and the conjugated parent action
mathematical_contract.canonicalization: H=UB with U unimodular; the aligned supercell geometry and finite-site action are changed to H coordinates once and never inferred from target coloring
mathematical_contract.node_order: coset-major then primitive-parent-site order; a periodic species-free assignment supplies an offline alignment certificate only
mathematical_contract.target_separation: terminal assignment tokens and composition counts are stored under a disjoint target object and are absent from carrier keys
mathematical_contract.history: archived O1 and failed Q1 artifacts, thresholds and conclusions remain byte-for-byte unchanged

advancement_rule: Only a complete pass permits a geometry-aware zero-training occupation expressivity audit. It does not authorize assignment training, generated-C, p(N), L1/M1, tensor conditioning, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
